overall.description: A dark, atmospheric forest wetland scene rendered in a game engine, featuring heavy teal color grading and dense fog. The stationary camera overlooks a misty swamp area surrounded by coniferous trees in low-light conditions, creating a moody, cinematic horror or survival game aesthetic.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the foggy wetland environment, possibly surveying the area or waiting

entered.detail: dense wall of evergreen trees forming the dark backdrop against the night sky
shallow swamp water covering the ground with visible submerged debris and logs
fallen tree trunks and branches partially submerged in the swamp water
thick mist hovering over the water surface reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a foggy forest swamp at night, rendered with cinematic teal color grading. Dense coniferous trees form a dark wall in the background while mist hovers over the shallow water in the foreground. Submerged logs and rocks are visible in the murky water, and the atmospheric fog creates a sense of isolation and tension typical of survival horror game environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a desolate forest swamp shrouded in a heavy, cinematic teal mist. It begins with a fixed perspective on the murky foreground, where submerged logs and jagged rocks break the surface of the shallow water. As the eye drifts deeper into the frame, the dense fog thickens, partially obscuring the base of a dark wall of coniferous trees. The scene remains suspended in this oppressive stillness, emphasizing a sense of isolation and tension within the low-light environment.
